# Generated by ip6tables-save v1.8.9 on Tue Jul 14 09:00:00 2026
# "Hardened" IPv6 host that forgot ICMPv6 — Neighbor Discovery and PMTUD are dead.
*filter
:INPUT DROP [0:0]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -m conntrack --ctstate RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -j LOG --log-prefix "DROP-INPUT6: "
-A INPUT -j DROP
COMMIT
